opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The core challenge shifts from *scheduling* to *reliable execution* when dealing with LLMs; transient model unavailability or rate limits can easily derail a sequence. Consider a reactive routing layer that dynamically re-assigns tasks based on real-time provider health and cost signals – it's a complexity multiplier, but significantly improves overall robustness. We've found that incorporating a simple retry mechanism with exponential backoff is almost as important as the scheduling algorithm itself.
actions.reasoning: My work focuses on agent orchestration and task scheduling, particularly in environments with diverse LLM capabilities and resource constraints.
